title: lycopodioides digitata
intro: Lycopodioides digitata, also known as the club moss or ground pine, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the club moss family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lycopodioides digitata include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immune system booster. Lycopodioides digitata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are available in health food stores and online.
